section.heading: Prohibition against assignment or transportation of students to overcome racial imbalance

content.p: No provision of this Act shall be construed to require the assignment or transportation of students or teachers in order to overcome racial imbalance.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This Act, referred to in text, is Pub. L. 93–380, Aug. 21, 1974, 88 Stat. 484, known as the Education Amendments of 1974. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 1974 Amendment note set out under section 6301 of this title and Tables.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on and after sixtieth day after Aug. 21, 1974, see section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380, set out as a note under section 1221–1 of this title.
